prompt: Build a premium education website inspired by LinguaFlow - Learn Languages Fast. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.

files.content:
LinguaFlow
Languages Our Method Pricing Success
Languages Our Method Pricing Success
Learn in 90 Days

Speak Like A Native

Personalized AI tutoring with native speakers. Proven method used by 2M+ learners worldwide.

Learn 25 Languages

🇪🇸 🇫🇷 🇩🇪 🇯🇵 🇮🇹

Learn Any Language

🇪🇸

Spanish

500M+ speakers

🇫🇷

French

300M+ speakers

🇩🇪

German

130M+ speakers

🇯🇵

Japanese

125M+ speakers

🇨🇳

Chinese

1.1B+ speakers

🇮🇹

Italian

70M+ speakers

🇵🇹

Portuguese

230M+ speakers

🇷🇺

Russian

260M+ speakers

🇰🇷

Korean

82M+ speakers

🇸🇦

Arabic

400M+ speakers

... and 15 more languages available

The LinguaFlow Method

AI-Powered Personalization

Smart algorithms adapt to your learning pace and style for maximum retention.

Native Speaker Tutors

Real conversations with vetted native speakers. Unlimited speaking practice.

Gamified Learning

Make learning fun with streaks, challenges, and achievements that keep you motivated.

Certified Progress

Official certificates recognized by employers and universities worldwide.

90-Day Language Journey

Days 1-30

Foundations & basics. Daily 15-min lessons.

Days 31-60

Conversation & speaking. Tutor sessions.

Days 61-90

Fluency & mastery. Real-world scenarios.

Certification

Earn official language proficiency cert.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Starter

For casual learners

$9.99/mo

  • 5 lessons per week
  • AI tutor only
  • Basic exercises
  • Native tutors
MOST POPULAR

Plus

For serious learners

$19.99/mo

  • Unlimited lessons
  • AI + 4 tutors/mo
  • All exercises
  • Certification

Pro

For professional learners

$39.99/mo

  • Everything in Plus
  • 20 tutors/month
  • Priority support
  • Custom curriculum

Success Stories

"Went from zero Spanish to conversational in 90 days! The native tutors made all the difference. Now I'm negotiating with Spanish clients at work!"

Jennifer Martinez

Business Professional

"The gamification keeps me motivated every day. I love the streaks and achievements. Learning feels like playing a game, not studying!"

David Chen

Student

"Best investment ever. Tripled my fluency in 3 months. Got promoted because I can now lead international team meetings in French!"

Sophie Dubois

Corporate Manager

Ready to Speak Like a Native?

Start your 7-day free trial today. No credit card required.
